name: SYS 06 — LinkedIn Content Pipeline
description: Runs daily at 6AM EST. Fetches RSS feeds (TechCrunch AI, VentureBeat AI, HN), parses recent stories, uses Claude to generate LinkedIn posts (hook, full post, hashtags), and appends drafts to the LinkedIn sheet for review. Keeps a queue of on-brand, timely content.

parameters.content:
## SYS 06 — LinkedIn Content Pipeline

**Trigger:** Daily 6AM EST (cron).

**What it does:** Fetches RSS feeds (TechCrunch AI, VentureBeat AI, HN Best), parses and filters to recent stories, uses Claude to generate a LinkedIn post (hook, full post, hashtags) per story, and appends drafts to the LinkedIn sheet for review. Optional approval flow or manual publish. Keeps a queue of on-brand, timely content.

**Dependencies:** CONFIG, Call Claude API, Google Sheets (LinkedIn tab), optional Google Chat for approval.
